Bake for 12-18 minutes, or until salmon is cooked through and flakes easily, and asparagus is tender-crisp.

snack.name: Greek Yogurt with Berries
snack.description: Creamy Greek yogurt topped with fresh mixed berries.
ingredients: 80 grams mixed berries (e.g., strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
snack.instructions: Combine Greek yogurt and mixed berries in a bowl.

breakfast.name: Oatmeal with Almonds and Apple
breakfast.description: Warm oatmeal topped with sliced apple and crunchy almonds.
ingredients: 200 ml water or unsweetened almond milk
breakfast.instructions: 1. Combine oats and water/almond milk in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened. 2. Stir in diced apple and cinnamon. 3. Pour into a bowl and top with sliced almonds.

lunch.name: Mediterranean Lentil Salad
lunch.description: Hearty and fresh salad with lentils, cucumber, tomatoes, and herbs.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
lunch.instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine cooked lentils, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion, parsley, and mint. 2. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 3. Pour dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine.

dinner.name: Halal Beef and Broccoli Stir-fry
dinner.description: Tender halal beef strips stir-fried with crisp broccoli florets in a savory sauce.
ingredients: 120 grams halal beef sirloin or flank steak, thinly sliced
salt and black pepper to taste
dinner.instructions: 1. Season beef strips with salt and pepper. 2. Heat olive oil in a large pan or wok over high heat. Add beef and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until browned. Remove beef from pan and set aside. 3. Add broccoli to the pan and stir-fry for 3-5 minutes until tender-crisp. Add a splash of water if needed to steam. 4. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, grated ginger, minced garlic, and cornstarch slurry. 5. Return beef to the pan with broccoli. Pour sauce over. Cook, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens and coats the beef and broccoli, about 1-2 minutes.

snack.name: Rice Cakes with Avocado
snack.description: Crispy rice cakes topped with creamy avocado slices.
snack.instructions: Spread or layer avocado slices on rice cakes. Season with salt and a pinch of red pepper flakes if desired.

breakfast.name: Turkish Menemen (Shakshuka-style)
breakfast.description: Scrambled eggs with sautéed tomatoes, peppers, and spices, served with a small piece of whole wheat bread.
ingredients: 50 grams bell pepper (green or red), diced
salt and black pepper to taste
breakfast.instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a small pan over medium heat. Add onion and bell pepper, sauté for 3-5 minutes until softened. 2. Add garlic, diced tomatoes, paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes break down and sauce thickens. 3. Crack eggs directly into the pan, or whisk them first and pour over the tomato mixture. Scramble gently or let them cook 'sunny-side-up' style within the sauce. Cook until desired doneness. 4. Serve hot with whole wheat bread.

lunch.name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Wraps
lunch.description: Light and refreshing tuna salad (canned in water) served in crisp lettuce cups.
ingredients: 1 can tuna in water (approx. 120g drained weight)
5 grams fresh dill or parsley, chopped
4 large lettuce leaves (e.g., butter lettuce, romaine)
salt and black pepper to taste
lunch.instructions: 1. Drain tuna well. In a bowl, flake the tuna. 2. Add Greek yogurt, celery, red onion, fresh dill/parsley, salt, and pepper. Mix well to combine. 3. Spoon the tuna salad into lettuce leaves.

dinner.name: Halal Ground Turkey & Black Bean Tacos
dinner.description: Flavorful halal ground turkey and black bean mixture served in warm whole wheat tortillas with fresh toppings.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
dinner.instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add ground turkey and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned. Drain any excess fat. 2. Stir in cooked black beans and taco seasoning. Add a splash of water if needed, and simmer for 5-7 minutes until heated through and flavors meld. 3. Warm tortillas according to package directions. 4. Assemble tacos: fill tortillas with turkey and bean mixture, top with diced tomatoes, shredded lettuce, and a dollop of light sour cream.

snack.name: Orange and a handful of Walnuts
snack.description: Sweet orange with a small portion of healthy walnuts.
snack.instructions: Peel orange and enjoy with walnuts.

breakfast.name: Protein Smoothie
breakfast.description: Blended smoothie with protein powder, spinach, banana, and almond milk.
ingredients: 1 scoop (approx. 25g) halal whey protein powder (vanilla or unflavored)
breakfast.instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Add ice if desired for a thicker, colder smoothie.

lunch.name: Leftover Halal Ground Turkey & Black Bean Bowl
lunch.description: Re-purposed delicious ground turkey and black bean mixture with a fresh base.
ingredients: 150 grams leftover halal ground turkey and black bean mixture
lunch.instructions: Warm the turkey and black bean mixture. Serve over cooked brown rice, topped with salsa and diced avocado.

dinner.name: Lamb Kofta with Tabbouleh (Middle Eastern)
dinner.description: Flavorful grilled lamb kofta served with fresh and zesty tabbouleh salad.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
dinner.instructions: 1. For Kofta: In a bowl, combine ground lamb, onion, parsley, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix well and form into 3-4 small oval 'koftas' or patties. Grill or pan-fry until cooked through. 2. For Tabbouleh: In a bowl, combine cooked bulgur, diced tomatoes, chopped cucumber, fresh mint, parsley, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Mix well. 3. Serve kofta with tabbouleh.

snack.name: Hard-Boiled Egg and Cherry Tomatoes
snack.description: Protein-rich hard-boiled egg with sweet cherry tomatoes.
snack.instructions: Peel the egg and enjoy with cherry tomatoes.

breakfast.name: Ricotta and Berries on Whole Wheat Toast
breakfast.description: Creamy ricotta cheese spread on toast, topped with fresh berries.
breakfast.instructions: Toast the bread. Spread ricotta cheese evenly over the toast. Top with mixed berries.

lunch.name: Italian Chicken and Vegetable Soup (Minestrone Style)
lunch.description: Hearty and warming soup packed with halal chicken, vegetables, and whole wheat pasta.
ingredients: 100 grams cooked halal chicken breast, shredded
150 grams mixed vegetables (e.g., carrots, celery, zucchini, spinach)
50 grams whole wheat pasta (e.g., ditalini or small shells)
salt and black pepper to taste
lunch.instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Add chopped carrots, celery, and zucchini (if using hardier veggies) and sauté for 5 minutes. 2. Add minced garlic, diced tomatoes, chicken broth, oregano, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer. 3. Add whole wheat pasta and cook according to package directions until al dente. 4. Stir in shredded chicken and spinach (if using) and cook for another 2-3 minutes until heated through and spinach is wilted. 5. Garnish with fresh basil if desired.

dinner.name: Baked Cod with Roasted Sweet Potato & Green Beans
dinner.description: Light and flaky baked cod fillet served with sweet potato and crisp green beans.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
dinner.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Line a baking tray with parchment paper. 2. Toss diced sweet potato and green beans with 5 ml olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Spread on one side of the tray. 3. Place cod fillet on the other side. Drizzle with 2 ml olive oil, season with salt, pepper, and paprika. 4. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cod is cooked through and sweet potato is tender.

snack.name: Small Pear with a handful of Pistachios
snack.description: Sweet and juicy pear paired with healthy pistachios.
snack.instructions: Enjoy the pear and pistachios together.

breakfast.name: Avocado Toast with a Fried Egg
breakfast.description: Creamy avocado on whole wheat toast, topped with a perfectly fried egg.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
breakfast.instructions: 1. Toast the whole wheat bread. 2. While bread toasts, heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Fry the egg to your liking (sunny-side up, over-easy). 3. Spread mashed avocado on the toast. Top with the fried egg. Season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes if desired.

lunch.name: Chicken Shawarma Salad Bowl
lunch.description: Marinated halal chicken served over mixed greens with a garlic yogurt dressing, inspired by Middle Eastern flavors.
ingredients: 120 grams halal chicken thigh, boneless, skinless
salt and black pepper to taste
lunch.instructions: 1. Cut chicken thigh into thin strips. Toss with olive oil and shawarma spice blend. Marinate for at least 15 minutes. 2. Cook chicken in a pan over medium-high heat until fully cooked and slightly browned. 3. Prepare garlic yogurt dressing by whisking Greek yogurt, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 4. Assemble the salad: place mixed greens, cucumber, and tomatoes in a bowl. Top with cooked chicken. Drizzle with garlic yogurt dressing.

dinner.name: Shrimp Scampi with Whole Wheat Linguine
dinner.description: Quick and flavorful shrimp cooked in garlic lemon sauce, served over whole wheat pasta.
ingredients: 30 ml halal white cooking wine or chicken broth
salt and black pepper to taste
dinner.instructions: 1. Cook whole wheat linguine according to package directions. Drain, reserving a bit of pasta water. 2. While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant (do not brown). 3. Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes until pink and opaque. 4. Pour in halal white cooking wine/broth and lemon juice. Bring to a simmer. 5. Add cooked linguine to the skillet. Toss to coat, adding a splash of reserved pasta water if needed to loosen the sauce. Stir in fresh parsley, salt, and pepper. Serve immediately.

snack.name: Cottage Cheese with Sliced Cucumber
snack.description: Creamy cottage cheese paired with crisp cucumber slices.
snack.instructions: Serve cottage cheese with sliced cucumber.

breakfast.name: Breakfast Burrito Bowl
breakfast.description: A deconstructed breakfast burrito with scrambled eggs, black beans, salsa, and avocado.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
breakfast.instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a pan. Scramble eggs until cooked to your preference. 2. Gently warm black beans in a small saucepan or microwave. 3. Assemble the bowl: place scrambled eggs and black beans as the base. Top with salsa and diced avocado.

lunch.name: Chicken and Vegetable Skewers with Brown Rice
lunch.description: Grilled halal chicken and colorful vegetables on skewers, served with brown rice.
ingredients: 100 grams mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onion, zucchini), cut into chunks
salt and black pepper to taste
lunch.instructions: 1. If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 30 minutes. 2. Toss chicken cubes and vegetable chunks with olive oil, paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. 3. Thread chicken and vegetables alternately onto skewers. 4. Grill or broil skewers for 10-15 minutes, turning occasionally, until chicken is cooked through and vegetables are tender-crisp. 5. Serve with cooked brown rice.

dinner.name: Italian Turkey Meatballs with Zucchini Noodles
dinner.description: Lean halal turkey meatballs in a marinara sauce, served over spiralized zucchini noodles.
ingredients: salt and black pepper to taste
dinner.instructions: 1. For Meatballs: In a bowl, combine ground turkey, breadcrumbs, egg, parsley, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper. Mix well and form into 6-8 small meatballs. 2. Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Cook meatballs, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides and cooked through. 3. Pour marinara sauce into the pan with meatballs. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes to allow flavors to meld. 4. In a separate pan, briefly sauté zucchini noodles for 2-3 minutes until tender-crisp (do not overcook). 5. Serve meatballs and sauce over zucchini noodles.

snack.name: Apple Slices with Peanut Butter
snack.description: Crisp apple slices with a dollop of natural peanut butter.
ingredients: 20 grams natural peanut butter (no added sugar)
snack.instructions: Slice the apple and serve with peanut butter for dipping.

plan_data.overview: A progressive 4-week bodyweight plan designed for beginners to improve general fitness and health. Focuses on building a foundation with balanced full-body engagement.

weeks.description: Getting your body used to movement patterns. Focus on correct form over speed. Aim for 20 seconds of work within the 1-minute active period.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly out. Push hips back and bend knees, lowering until thighs are parallel to floor or as low as comfortable. Drive through heels to stand. Focus on control.
exercises.easier: Squat to a chair or lower surface, or reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Pause for 2 seconds at the bottom of each squat.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Ups
exercises.description: Place hands on an elevated surface (like a sturdy table or counter) shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the edge, keeping your body in a straight line. Push back up. The higher the surface, the easier.
exercises.easier: Use a higher surface or perform on knees.
exercises.harder: Use a lower surface (e.g., stairs, low bench).

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Lift your hips off the floor by squeezing your glutes, creating a straight line from shoulders to knees. Lower slowly.
exercises.easier: Reduce the range of motion or hold at the top for shorter duration.
exercises.harder: Hold at the top for 3 seconds, or lift one leg slightly off the ground.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.description: Hold a push-up position, resting on your forearms instead of hands. Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Engage your core and glutes. Breathe steadily.
exercises.easier: Perform on your knees, or hold for a shorter duration within the minute.
exercises.harder: Hold for the full 60 seconds, or lift one leg slightly off the ground.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.description: Step forward with one leg, lowering your hips until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle. Your front knee should be directly above your ankle, and your back knee should hover just off the floor. Push off your back foot and step forward into the next lunge with the opposite leg.
exercises.easier: Reduce the depth of the lunge or take shorter steps.
exercises.harder: Add a small hop as you switch legs.

exercises.name: High Knees (light)
exercises.description: Jog in place, bringing your knees up towards your chest. Swing your arms to help maintain momentum. Focus on a steady pace.
exercises.easier: March in place, lifting knees gently.
exercises.harder: Increase the speed and height of your knees.

exercises.name: Wall Push-Ups
exercises.description: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away. Place hands on the wall slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lean forward, bending elbows to bring chest closer to the wall. Push back to start. Keep body straight.
exercises.easier: Stand closer to the wall.
exercises.harder: Stand further from the wall.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees, hands under shoulders, knees under hips. Extend right arm forward and left leg backward simultaneously, keeping hips and shoulders square to the floor. Hold briefly. Return to start and repeat on the other side. Alternate.
exercises.easier: Extend only one limb at a time (arm or leg).
exercises.harder: Hold the extended position for 3 seconds, or tap the extended hand/foot to the floor before repeating.

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach with arms and legs extended. Simultaneously lift your arms, chest, and legs off the floor, squeezing your back muscles and glutes. Hold for a second, then lower slowly.
exercises.easier: Lift only arms or legs, or reduce the height of the lift.
exercises.harder: Hold the lifted position for 3 seconds, or lift arms and legs higher.

Focus on smooth transitions.
exercises.easier: Reduce the depth of the lunge or take shorter steps.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.description: Start with feet together and arms at sides. Jump, spreading legs shoulder-width apart and raising arms overhead. Jump again to return to the start. Maintain a brisk but controlled pace.
exercises.easier: Perform step jacks (step one leg out to the side at a time while raising arms).

exercises.harder: Hold the lifted position for 3 seconds, or lift arms and legs higher.

exercises.name: Triceps Dips (using floor)
exercises.description: Sit on the floor with knees bent, feet flat. Place hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your hips, about shoulder-width apart. Lift your hips off the floor. Lower your body by bending your elbows (keeping them close to your body) until they reach about 90 degrees. Push back up.
exercises.easier: Keep hips closer to your hands, or bend knees less.
exercises.harder: Straighten your legs, or lift one leg off the floor.

exercises.harder: Increase the height of the jump and focus on quick transitions.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: Start in a high plank position. Bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch legs, as if running in place. Keep your core tight and hips stable.

plan_data.plan_name: 4-Week Resistance Band Strength & Fat Loss Plan
plan_data.overview: A progressive 4-week plan designed for intermediate individuals aiming for weight loss and muscle building, utilizing resistance bands for a balanced full-body workout. Focuses on minimizing lower back strain.

weeks.description: Establishing proper form with resistance bands and moderate intensity. Focus on controlled movements to build a solid base.

exercises.name: Band Chest Press
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you (e.g., door handle, sturdy furniture). Hold handles at chest level, palms facing down. Step forward to create tension. Press handles forward until arms are extended. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter resistance band or stand closer to anchor point.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier resistance band or stand further from anchor point.

exercises.name: Band Rows
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Sit or stand facing anchor, holding handles. Pull handles towards your torso, squeezing shoulder blades together. Keep back straight and core engaged. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or sit closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or stand further from anchor.

exercises.name: Band Squats
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet shoulder-width apart. Hold handles at shoulder height. Perform a squat, pushing hips back and lowering until thighs are parallel to the floor. Keep chest up and back straight. Drive through heels to return to standing.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or hold handles lower.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or hold handles higher (closer to ears).

exercises.name: Band Wood Chops (Low to High)
exercises.description: Anchor band low to one side. Stand with feet hip-width apart, side-on to anchor. Hold handle with both hands. Rotate torso and pull band diagonally upwards across your body, extending arm. Keep core tight and avoid arching lower back. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion. Focus on rotation from torso, not arms.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase range of motion. Step slightly away from anchor point.

exercises.name: Band Glute Bridges
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent, feet flat on floor. Place band around thighs, just above knees. Lift hips off the floor, squeezing glutes at the top. Push knees outwards against the band. Keep core engaged and avoid overarching lower back. Lower slowly.
exercises.easier: Remove the band. Focus on squeezing glutes.
exercises.harder: Place band higher up on thighs, or add a light weight on hips.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Aparts
exercises.description: Hold band with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, arms extended in front of you at chest height. Keeping arms straight, pull the band apart by squeezing shoulder blades together. Return slowly.
exercises.easier: Wider grip on the band.
exercises.harder: Narrower grip on the band. Keep arms slightly bent.

exercises.name: Plank with Band
exercises.description: Assume a forearm plank position. Place band around wrists. Maintain a straight line from head to heels, engaging core. Try to keep tension on the band by slightly pulling wrists apart.
exercises.easier: Perform on knees. Remove band.
exercises.harder: Hold for longer duration. Increase band tension by moving wrists closer together initially.

exercises.name: Band Romanian Deadlifts (RDLs)
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet hip-width apart. Hold handles in front of thighs. Keeping legs mostly straight with a slight bend in knees, hinge at the hips, lowering torso towards the floor. Keep back straight and core engaged. Feel the stretch in hamstrings. Return to standing by squeezing glutes.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion. Focus on form.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or hold handles closer to the floor. Add a slight pause at the bottom.

exercises.name: Band Hip Abductions
exercises.description: Stand with band around ankles. Slightly bend knees and hinge hips forward to engage glutes. Keeping one leg stationary, lift the other leg out to the side against the band's resistance. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Place band around thighs. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Place band around ankles. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Band Bird Dog
exercises.description: Place band around feet. Start on hands and knees (tabletop position), keeping back neutral and core engaged. Extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously, maintaining stability and avoiding hip rotation or lower back arching. Return slowly.
exercises.easier: Remove the band. Focus on slow, controlled movement.
exercises.harder: Add a light pulse at the extended position. Use a heavier band.

exercises.name: Band Lateral Walks
exercises.description: Place band around ankles or thighs. Stand with feet hip-width apart, slight bend in knees. Step laterally, maintaining tension on the band. Keep core engaged and avoid letting feet come too close together. Take 15 steps to the right, then 15 to the left.
exercises.easier: Place band around thighs. Take smaller steps.
exercises.harder: Place band around ankles. Take larger steps. Stay lower in a squat position.

exercises.name: Band Chest Flyes
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you at chest height. Hold handles, palms facing each other. Step forward to create tension. Keeping a slight bend in elbows, bring arms forward and together in a hugging motion, squeezing chest. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or stand closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or stand further from anchor. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Band Bicep Curls
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet shoulder-width apart. Hold handles with underhand grip, palms facing forward. Keeping elbows tucked, curl handles up towards shoulders. Squeeze biceps at the top. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or step narrower on band.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or step wider on band. Slow the eccentric (lowering) phase.

exercises.name: Band Squat Jumps
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet shoulder-width apart. Hold handles at shoulder height. Perform a squat. Explode upwards into a jump. Land softly back into a squat position. Keep core engaged and control the descent.
exercises.easier: Perform regular band squats. Remove band.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band. Jump higher. Land softer.

exercises.name: Light Cardio (Walking/Cycling)
exercises.description: Engage in light cardiovascular activity to promote blood flow and aid recovery. Keep intensity low.
exercises.easier: Shorter duration, lower intensity.
exercises.harder: Slightly longer duration, slightly higher intensity.

exercises.name: Band Assisted Stretches
exercises.description: Use the band for gentle assisted stretching. Examples: hamstring stretch, quad stretch, shoulder stretch. Focus on feeling a gentle pull, not pain. Ensure no lower back strain.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or no band.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase stretch duration.

exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase range of motion.

exercises.description: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Place band around thighs. Lift hips, squeezing glutes. Push knees outwards against band. Control lower.
exercises.easier: Remove the band. Focus on glute squeeze.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or add a light weight on hips.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Aparts
exercises.description: Hold band, hands shoulder-width apart, arms extended. Pull band apart by squeezing shoulder blades. Control return.
exercises.easier: Wider grip on band.
exercises.harder: Narrower grip on band. Keep arms slightly bent.

exercises.name: Plank with Band
exercises.description: Forearm plank, band around wrists. Maintain straight line. Slightly pull wrists apart against band.
exercises.easier: Perform on knees. Remove band.
exercises.harder: Hold for longer. Increase band tension.

exercises.name: Band Romanian Deadlifts (RDLs)
exercises.description: Stand on band, feet hip-width apart. Hold handles in front of thighs. Hinge at hips, lowering torso. Keep back straight. Return by squeezing glutes.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or hold handles lower. Pause at bottom.

exercises.name: Band Hip Abductions
exercises.description: Band around ankles. Slightly bend knees, hinge hips forward. Lift one leg out to the side against resistance. Control return.
exercises.easier: Place band around thighs. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Place band around ankles. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Band Bird Dog
exercises.description: Band around feet. On hands and knees, extend opposite arm and leg. Maintain stability, avoid lower back arching. Control return.
exercises.easier: Remove the band. Focus on slow movement.
exercises.harder: Add a pulse at extended position. Use heavier band.

exercises.name: Band Lateral Walks
exercises.description: Band around ankles or thighs. Step laterally, maintaining tension. 20 steps right, 20 steps left. Keep core engaged.
exercises.easier: Band around thighs. Smaller steps.
exercises.harder: Band around ankles. Larger steps. Stay lower.

exercises.name: Band Chest Flyes
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you at chest height. Hold handles, palms facing each other. Bring arms forward and together, squeezing chest. Control return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or stand closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or stand further from anchor. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Band Bicep Curls
exercises.description: Stand on band, feet shoulder-width apart. Hold handles underhand grip. Keeping elbows tucked, curl handles up. Squeeze biceps. Control return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or step narrower on band.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or step wider on band. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Band Squat Jumps
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulder height. Squat, then explode up into a jump. Land softly into squat. Control descent.
exercises.easier: Perform regular band squats. Remove band.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band. Jump higher. Land softer.

exercises.harder: Slightly longer duration, slightly higher intensity.

exercises.name: Band Assisted Stretches

exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase stretch duration.

exercises.harder: Use a heavier resistance band or stand further from anchor point.

exercises.name: Band Rows

exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or sit closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or stand further from anchor.

plan_data.overview: A progressive 4-week workout plan designed for intermediate fitness levels aiming for weight loss and muscle building, utilizing resistance bands and prioritizing full-body engagement while being mindful of lower back health. This plan incorporates 5 workout days per week, with rest days strategically placed.

weeks.description: Focus on mastering proper form and building a base. Workouts are structured to introduce movements and build muscular endurance with lighter resistance.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Chest Press
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you (e.g., around a sturdy pole or held by a partner). Stand or sit tall, hold bands at chest level, palms facing down. Push hands forward, extending arms. Slowly return to start.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter resistance band or stand closer to anchor point.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier resistance band or stand further from anchor point.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Rows
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Sit or stand with back straight, feet hip-width apart. Pull band towards your torso, squeezing shoulder blades. Keep elbows close to your body. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter resistance band or sit closer to anchor point.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier resistance band or sit further from anchor point.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squats
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, band under feet, holding handles at shoulder height. Lower into a squat, pushing hips back and keeping chest up. Drive through heels to stand. Avoid rounding your back.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter resistance band or decrease range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier resistance band or increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Plank with Band Pull-Apart
exercises.description: Hold a plank on forearms or hands. Loop a light resistance band around wrists. Keeping core engaged and hips stable, pull band apart by moving arms outwards, squeezing shoulder blades. Slowly return. Avoid hip rocking.
exercises.easier: Perform plank without the band pull-apart. Focus on core stability.
exercises.harder: Hold a heavier band or increase the duration of the pull-apart phase.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Glute Bridges
exercises.description: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat on floor hip-width apart. Place a resistance band around thighs, just above knees. Lift hips off the floor, squeezing glutes. Push knees slightly outwards against the band. Lower slowly. Keep lower back neutral.
exercises.easier: Perform without the resistance band.
exercises.harder: Place the band higher on thighs or use a heavier band.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Lateral Walks
exercises.description: Place a resistance band around ankles or just above knees. Stand with feet hip-width apart, knees slightly bent, slight squat. Step sideways, maintaining tension on the band. Keep chest up and core engaged. Take 10-15 steps in one direction, then switch.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter resistance band or decrease step width.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier resistance band or increase step width and depth of squat.

exercises.name: High Knees (with light band for resistance)
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Place a light band around ankles. Drive one knee up towards your chest, then switch to the other leg, as if running in place. Engage core to minimize hip rocking.
exercises.easier: Perform without the band, focus on pace. Or perform stationary marching.
exercises.harder: Increase pace and height of knees. Use a slightly heavier band.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Overhead Press
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet shoulder-width apart. Hold handles at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press hands straight up overhead. Slowly lower back to start. Keep core tight and avoid arching lower back.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or decrease range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Bicep Curls
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet hip-width apart. Hold handles with palms facing up. Keeping elbows tucked to your sides, curl hands towards shoulders. Squeeze biceps at the top. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or decrease range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Face Pulls
exercises.muscle_group: Upper Back, Rear Shoulders, Rotator Cuff
exercises.description: Anchor band at head height. Grab band with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Step back to create tension. Pull band towards your face, aiming for the forehead/nose area, while externally rotating shoulders (thumbs point back). Squeeze shoulder blades. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or anchor lower. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or anchor higher. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Pallof Press
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Stand sideways to anchor, holding band handle with both hands at chest. Step away to create tension. Press hands straight out in front of you, resisting the band's pull. Hold for a second, then slowly return. Keep core tight and hips square.
exercises.easier: Stand closer to the anchor point. Use a lighter band.
exercises.harder: Stand further from the anchor point. Use a heavier band.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squat to Row
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles. Perform a squat, then as you stand, immediately perform a row, pulling band towards your chest. Focus on fluid movement.
exercises.easier: Perform squat and row separately. Use lighter band.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase tempo slightly.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Chest Fly
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you. Stand tall, slight bend in elbows. Start with hands in front of chest, then extend arms out to the sides in a wide arc, feeling a stretch in the chest. Bring hands back to start.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Deadlifts (Romanian)
exercises.description: Stand on band, feet hip-width apart. Hold handles with arms extended in front of thighs. Keeping legs mostly straight (slight bend), hinge at hips, lowering band towards floor. Keep back flat and chest up. Feel stretch in hamstrings. Return to standing by squeezing glutes.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band. Reduce range of motion. Focus on form, keep back absolutely flat.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion slightly, but maintain flat back. Keep core engaged.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Bicycle Crunches
exercises.description: Lie on back. Loop band around feet. Bring knees towards chest, hands lightly behind head. Alternate bringing opposite elbow to opposite knee, extending other leg. Keep lower back pressed to floor. Engage core throughout.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Focus on controlled crunch.
exercises.harder: Increase pace while maintaining control. Use slightly heavier band.

weeks.description: Increasing resistance and duration slightly. Focus on controlled movements and maintaining good form as intensity increases.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Chest Press
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you. Stand or sit tall. Push hands forward, extending arms. Slowly return to start.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or stand closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or stand further from anchor. Add a slight pause at full extension.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Rows
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Pull band towards your torso, squeezing shoulder blades. Keep elbows close. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or sit closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or sit further from anchor. Focus on squeezing shoulder blades at peak contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squats
exercises.description: Stand on band, holding handles at shoulder height. Lower into a squat. Drive through heels to stand. Maintain an upright torso.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or decrease squat depth.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase squat depth. Add a 1-second pause at the bottom.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Bird Dog
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees, band looped around one foot and opposite hand (or under chest for resistance). Extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously, keeping core engaged and hips level. Avoid arching lower back. Return slowly. Perform on both sides.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Focus on core stability and controlled extension.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase the duration of the hold at full extension.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Glute Bridges with Abduction
exercises.description: Band around thighs. Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Lift hips, squeezing glutes. Simultaneously, push knees outwards against the band. Hold briefly, then lower.
exercises.easier: Perform without abduction. Focus on glute squeeze.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or hold the outward push for 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Lateral Walks
exercises.description: Band around ankles or knees. Step sideways, maintaining tension. Keep chest up, slight squat. Take 15 steps each direction.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce step width.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase step width and depth of squat.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squat Jacks
exercises.description: Stand on band, feet hip-width apart. Start with hands at shoulders. Perform a squat. As you return to standing, jump and spread legs wide (star jump). Land softly, immediately going into the next squat. Keep band tension.
exercises.easier: Perform regular squat jacks without the band. Or perform regular step jacks with band.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band. Increase jump height and speed.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Overhead Press
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulder height. Press hands straight up. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion. Add a 1-second hold at the top.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Bicep Curls
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles palms up. Keep elbows tucked. Curl hands towards shoulders. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion. Try Hammer Curls variation (palms facing each other).

exercises.name: Resistance Band Face Pulls
exercises.muscle_group: Upper Back, Rear Shoulders, Rotator Cuff
exercises.description: Anchor band at head height. Pull band towards face, externally rotating shoulders. Squeeze shoulder blades. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or anchor lower. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or anchor higher. Increase range of motion. Slow the negative (return) phase.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Pallof Press
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Stand sideways. Press hands straight out, resisting the pull. Hold, then return.
exercises.easier: Stand closer to anchor. Use lighter band.
exercises.harder: Stand further from anchor. Use heavier band. Hold the extended position for 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squat to Overhead Press
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulders. Perform a squat. As you stand, press handles overhead. Lower handles, then repeat.
exercises.easier: Perform squat and press separately. Use lighter band.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase tempo slightly.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Pullovers
exercises.description: Anchor band overhead (high). Grab band handles, step back to create tension. Keep arms mostly straight, lower band behind your head, feeling stretch in lats. Pull band back to starting position using lats and chest.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion. Slow the negative.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles. Hinge at hips, keeping back flat. Lower band towards floor. Return by squeezing glutes.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band. Reduce range of motion. Focus on flat back.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion slightly. Hold at bottom for 1 second.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Russian Twists
exercises.description: Sit on floor, knees bent, feet on floor or slightly elevated. Loop band around feet. Hold handles together. Lean back slightly (maintain flat back), keeping core tight. Twist torso side to side, tapping handles (or bringing hands) towards the floor.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Focus on controlled twist. Keep feet on floor.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Elevate feet higher. Increase range of motion.

weeks.description: Challenging your muscles with heavier resistance and more complex movements. Maintaining form is crucial.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Chest Press (Incline)
exercises.description: Anchor band slightly lower than chest height (e.g., around a low table or attachment point). Stand or sit tall, hold bands, and press upwards at an incline. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or anchor higher (closer to chest press).
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or anchor lower. Increase range of motion.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Single-Arm Rows
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Stand sideways, holding one handle with the arm furthest from the anchor. Pull band towards your torso, keeping elbow close. Squeeze shoulder blade. Slowly return. Perform on both sides.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or stand closer to anchor.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or stand further from anchor. Focus on contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Goblet Squats
exercises.description: Stand on band, feet shoulder-width apart. Hold both handles together at chest height, like a goblet. Lower into a deep squat, keeping chest up and back straight. Drive through heels to stand.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce squat depth.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase squat depth. Add a 2-second pause at the bottom.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Plank Jacks
exercises.description: Start in a high plank position, band around ankles. Keeping hips stable, jump feet wide apart, then back together. Minimize hip movement.
exercises.easier: Perform plank without the jumps. Or perform Step Jacks with the band.
exercises.harder: Increase speed of jumps, or use a heavier band.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hip Thrusts
exercises.description: Anchor band around a sturdy object behind you, or have a partner hold it. Loop band around hips. Lie on your back, feet flat on floor, knees bent. Drive hips up, squeezing glutes. Keep lower back neutral. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Perform without the band. Focus on glute squeeze.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase range of motion by elevating shoulders on a bench/couch.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Curtsy Lunges
exercises.description: Stand on band, holding handles at shoulder height. Step one leg back and across your body, as if doing a curtsy. Lower until thigh is parallel to floor. Push off back foot to return to start. Alternate legs.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion and focus on controlled descent.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hamstring Curls
exercises.description: Anchor band low to the ground. Lie on your stomach, loop band around ankles. Curl heels towards glutes, squeezing hamstrings. Slowly straighten legs.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion. Add a 1-second hold at peak contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Overhead Press (Arnold Press)
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles with palms facing you at shoulder level, elbows bent. Press hands up and overhead, rotating palms to face forward as you extend. Rotate palms back to face you as you lower.
exercises.easier: Perform regular overhead press. Use lighter band.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase tempo slightly on the press.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hammer Curls
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles with palms facing each other (neutral grip). Keeping elbows tucked, curl hands towards shoulders. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion. Add a 1-second hold at the top.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Pull-Aparts (Wide Grip)
exercises.description: Hold band with hands wider than shoulder-width apart, arms extended in front at chest height. Pull band apart by squeezing shoulder blades, bringing hands out to the sides. Keep arms relatively straight. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or narrow grip. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or wider grip. Increase range of motion. Slow the negative.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Side Planks with Hip Dips
exercises.description: Hold a side plank, band around ankles. Lower hips towards the floor, then raise them back up to neutral plank position. Keep core tight and hips stacked. Perform on both sides.
exercises.easier: Perform side plank without hip dips. Use lighter band or perform without band.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion of hip dips.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squat Jumps with Banded Overhead Press
exercises.muscle_group: Full Body (Legs, Glutes, Shoulders, Triceps, Cardio)
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulders. Perform a squat jump. As you land and go into the next squat, press handles overhead. Alternate between squat jumps and presses.
exercises.easier: Perform regular squat jumps and regular overhead presses separately. Use lighter band.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase jump height and press intensity.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Renegade Rows
exercises.description: Anchor band low. Start in high plank position, holding handles. Keeping core tight and hips stable, row one handle towards your chest. Lower, then repeat on the other side. Minimize body rotation.
exercises.easier: Perform plank taps instead of rows. Or anchor band higher and perform rows without plank.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase duration of hold at top of row.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Glute Kickbacks
exercises.description: Anchor band low. Stand on one end of the band, loop the other end around your ankle. Keeping leg mostly straight and core engaged, kick leg back, squeezing glute. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Focus on glute squeeze. Reduce range of motion.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion. Add a 1-second hold at peak contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Crunches
exercises.description: Anchor band overhead. Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Hold handles at chest level. Pull band down towards your chest as you crunch upwards, engaging abs. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Focus on controlled crunch.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion.

weeks.description: The final week, pushing your limits with maximum resistance and intensity. Focus on completing all reps with good form.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Chest Press (Incline) - Increased Time
exercises.description: Anchor band low. Stand or sit tall, hold bands, and press upwards at an incline. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or anchor higher. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or anchor lower. Maintain control throughout the longer duration.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Single-Arm Rows - Increased Time
exercises.description: Anchor band at chest height. Stand sideways, hold one handle. Pull band towards your torso, squeezing shoulder blade. Slowly return. Perform on both sides.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or stand closer to anchor. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or stand further from anchor. Focus on sustained contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Goblet Squats - Increased Time
exercises.description: Stand on band, holding handles at chest height. Lower into a deep squat. Drive through heels to stand. Maintain an upright torso.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce squat depth. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase squat depth. Hold at the bottom for 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Plank Jacks - Increased Reps
exercises.description: Start in a high plank position, band around ankles. Keeping hips stable, jump feet wide apart, then back together. Aim for more controlled repetitions within the minute.
exercises.easier: Perform plank without jumps. Or perform Step Jacks with the band. Reduce repetitions.
exercises.harder: Increase speed of jumps, or use a heavier band. Focus on maintaining a strong core throughout.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hip Thrusts - Increased Time
exercises.description: Anchor band behind you, loop around hips. Lie on your back, feet flat. Drive hips up, squeezing glutes. Keep lower back neutral. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Perform without the band. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase range of motion. Hold at the top for 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Curtsy Lunges - Increased Time
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulder height. Step one leg back and across your body. Lower until thigh is parallel to floor. Push off back foot to return. Alternate legs.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Reduce range of motion. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion and focus on controlled descent.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hamstring Curls - Increased Time
exercises.description: Anchor band low. Lie on your stomach, loop band around ankles. Curl heels towards glutes, squeezing hamstrings. Slowly straighten legs.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce range of motion. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion. Add a 2-second hold at peak contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Overhead Press (Arnold Press) - Increased Time
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles. Press up and overhead, rotating palms. Rotate palms back to face you as you lower.
exercises.easier: Perform regular overhead press. Use lighter band. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase tempo slightly on the press, maintain control on the negative.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Hammer Curls - Increased Time
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles with palms facing each other. Keep elbows tucked. Curl hands towards shoulders. Slowly lower.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or reduce range of motion. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or increase range of motion. Add a 2-second hold at the top.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Pull-Aparts (Wide Grip) - Increased Time
exercises.description: Hold band wider than shoulder-width, arms extended. Pull band apart by squeezing shoulder blades. Slowly return.
exercises.easier: Use lighter band or narrow grip. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band or wider grip. Increase range of motion. Slow the negative.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Side Planks with Hip Dips - Increased Time
exercises.description: Hold a side plank, band around ankles. Lower hips towards the floor, then raise them back up to neutral plank position. Perform on both sides.
exercises.easier: Perform side plank without hip dips. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heavier band. Increase range of motion of hip dips. Focus on sustained tension.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squat Jumps with Banded Overhead Press - Increased Intensity
exercises.muscle_group: Full Body (Legs, Glutes, Shoulders, Triceps, Cardio)
exercises.description: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulders. Perform a squat jump. As you land and go into the next squat, press handles overhead. Alternate.
exercises.easier: Perform regular squat jumps and regular overhead presses separately. Use lighter band. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heaviest possible band. Increase jump height and press intensity. Focus on explosive power.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Renegade Rows - Increased Intensity
exercises.description: Anchor band low. Start in high plank position, holding handles. Keeping core tight and hips stable, row one handle towards your chest. Lower, then repeat on the other side. Minimize body rotation.
exercises.easier: Perform plank taps instead of rows. Anchor band higher. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heaviest possible band. Focus on minimal hip and torso rotation.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Glute Kickbacks - Increased Intensity
exercises.description: Anchor band low. Stand on one end, loop other around ankle. Kick leg back, squeezing glute. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use heaviest possible band. Increase range of motion. Add a 2-second hold at peak contraction.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Mountain Climbers with Band
exercises.description: Start in high plank position, band around ankles. Drive knees towards chest one at a time, as if running in place. Keep hips low and core engaged.
exercises.easier: Perform without band. Focus on speed and control. Reduce duration.
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band. Increase pace and ensure hips remain stable and low.

plan_data.overview: A progressive plan focusing on full body strength and fat burning using resistance bands, suitable for intermediate fitness levels. This plan prioritizes a balanced approach while being mindful of lower back health.

weeks.description: Establish proper form with resistance bands and build a base level of strength and endurance. Focus on controlled movements and mind-muscle connection. Be mindful of lower back engagement.

exercises.name: Band Squats
exercises.description: Stand on the band with feet shoulder-width apart, holding handles at shoulder height. Perform squats, keeping chest up and core engaged. Ensure no lower back arching.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or perform fewer reps
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Band Chest Press
exercises.description: Anchor the band behind you (e.g., on a sturdy object or hold under feet). Stand or sit, holding handles at chest level. Press hands forward, extending arms fully. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Band Pull-Aparts
exercises.description: Hold the band with an overhand grip, arms extended in front of you at shoulder height. Keeping arms mostly straight, pull the band apart by squeezing shoulder blades together. Return slowly.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Bird-Dog with Band
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees, band under one hand and looping around the opposite foot. Extend opposing arm and leg simultaneously, keeping core stable and back flat. Avoid arching the lower back. Return to start.
exercises.easier: Perform without the band, focus on control
exercises.harder: Hold the extended position for a few seconds

exercises.name: Band High Knees
exercises.description: Stand on the band, holding handles at hip level. Drive knees up towards chest, keeping core tight. Mimic running in place.
exercises.easier: Tap toes instead of high knees
exercises.harder: Increase pace and arm drive

exercises.name: Band Russian Twists
exercises.description: Sit on the floor, knees bent, feet flat. Loop band around feet, holding handles. Lean back slightly with a straight back, keeping core engaged. Twist torso side to side, touching handles to floor.
exercises.easier: Perform without the band, or with feet on floor
exercises.harder: Lift feet off the floor

exercises.name: Band Glute Bridges
exercises.description: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Place band around thighs just above knees. Lift hips off the floor, squeezing glutes, pushing knees out against the band. Lower slowly.
exercises.easier: Perform without the band
exercises.harder: Hold the top contraction for 2 seconds

exercises.name: Band Romanian Deadlifts (RDL)
exercises.description: Stand on the band, feet hip-width apart, holding handles in front of thighs. Keeping legs mostly straight with a slight bend in knees, hinge at the hips, lowering handles towards the floor. Feel stretch in hamstrings. Maintain a flat back and engaged core. Squeeze glutes to return to standing.
exercises.easier: Reduce range of motion or use a lighter band
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Band Squat Walks
exercises.description: Place band around ankles. Get into a slight squat position. Step sideways, maintaining tension on the band and staying low. Take 10-15 steps in one direction, then 10-15 steps back.
exercises.easier: Place band around thighs or perform fewer steps
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase steps

exercises.name: Band Rows (Seated or Standing)
exercises.description: Anchor band in front of you (e.g., around a sturdy pole or doorway). Sit or stand with legs extended, holding handles. Pull handles towards your torso, squeezing shoulder blades together. Keep back straight and core engaged.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or perform fewer reps
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Plank with Band Around Wrists
exercises.description: Assume a plank position on forearms or hands, with band around wrists, creating slight tension. Hold position, keeping body in a straight line from head to heels. Avoid letting hips sag or rise too high.
exercises.easier: Perform on knees or reduce hold time
exercises.harder: Hold for longer or add slight shoulder taps

exercises.name: Band Squat Jumps
exercises.description: Stand on the band, holding handles at shoulder height. Perform a squat, then explosively jump upwards. Land softly and immediately go into the next squat.
exercises.easier: Perform regular band squats, focusing on speed
exercises.harder: Increase height of jump

exercises.name: Band Overhead Press
exercises.description: Stand on the band, feet shoulder-width apart, holding handles at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press hands straight overhead. Control the descent.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Band Bicep Curls
exercises.description: Stand on the band, feet shoulder-width apart, holding handles with palms facing up. Keeping elbows tucked in, curl hands towards shoulders. Lower with control.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or reduce range of motion
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or increase reps

exercises.name: Band Wood Chops (High to Low)
exercises.description: Anchor band overhead to one side. Stand facing anchor, feet shoulder-width apart, holding handle with both hands. Pull band diagonally across your body, from high to low, rotating torso. Control the return.
exercises.easier: Reduce range of motion or use a lighter band
exercises.harder: Increase range of motion or use a heavier band

exercises.name: Light Band Walks (forward/backward)
exercises.description: Place band around ankles. Take small, controlled steps forward and backward, maintaining a slight squat. Focus on activation and blood flow.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band or no band
exercises.harder: Use a heavier band or maintain deeper squat

exercises.name: Band Pull-Aparts
exercises.description: Hold band, arms extended, pull apart squeezing shoulder blades. Focus on posture.
exercises.easier: Use a lighter band
exercises.harder: Perform with a slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Walking (brisk)
exercises.description: Brisk walk to increase heart rate and promote recovery.
exercises.easier: Slower pace
exercises.harder: Faster pace or incorporate inclines
